title: Better Graphics
description: Makes minecraft very beautiful and does not require a very powerful PC
body:
![Лес](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e23a3af992e7f9bf6f7565a7ad3fa255beda7504.png)


This assembly changes the graphics of minecraft to unreasonable beauty. But at the same time, maintaining its vannel and do not require high performance of the PC.

What the assembly does:
- New shocking lighting
- Incredibly large drawing and beautiful landscapes
- Now there are much more details and visual effects in the world

With all this, the assembly mods affect only the visual and nothing more

![Лава](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0de78fcb913dfab50a7bb1dc48ee4e8017097a0b.png)
